[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001110 4
1 00111100 4
2 11001111 6
3 00000000 a
4 01110001 4
5 00001110 3
6 10100111 5
7 10011110 5

12 21 10000110 3
23 32 10001110 4 match 0

45 54 00001100 2
56 65 00000000 a match 3
67 76 00000000 a match 3
70 07 00000000 a match 3

13 31 10000111 4
24 42 00011100 3
35 53 11001111 6 match 2
46 64 00000000 a match 3

60 06 00000000 a match 3
71 17 00100001 2

14 41 00100100 2

36 63 00000000 a match 3
47 74 00110000 2
50 05 00001110 3 match 5
61 16 00000000 a match 3
72 27 00010000 1

37 73 01000001 2
